title: Marina Abramovic & Ulay: No Predicted End
original_title: Marina Abramović & Ulay: No Predicted End
overview: Thirty years after their separation, performance artists Marina Abramović and Frank Uwe 'Ulay' Laysiepen (1943-2020) agree to meet, for the first time on camera, for a raw and honest conversation about their life, art and legacy.

trailers.title: Marina Abramović & Ulay on Their Meeting at MoMA

trailer_groups.title: Marina Abramović & Ulay on Their Meeting at MoMA

en.title: Marina Abramović & Ulay on Their Meeting at MoMA
